name: aws-pilot-marketplace
description: Two AWS plugins for Claude Code: (1) aws-pilot — Claude controls your AWS account end-to-end (EC2, SSH keys, S3, Lambda, IAM, billing); (2) aws-bb-toolkit — offensive AWS recon and exploitation for authorized bug bounty programs.

plugins.name: aws-pilot
plugins.description: Claude controls your AWS account: provision EC2/VPS, generate SSH keys, manage S3/Lambda/RDS, configure IAM and Route53, monitor billing and CloudWatch. Designed for users who don't know AWS — read-only by default, destructive ops require explicit confirmation, full audit log.

plugins.name: aws-bb-toolkit
plugins.description: Offensive AWS recon and exploitation toolkit for authorized bug bounty programs whose scope includes AWS infrastructure. Atomic skills for IAM enum, S3/Lambda/Secrets recon, IMDS abuse, and CloudTrail pivot. Read-only by default; never modifies the target.
